description: Style Note Featuring your little hero's favourite toons, this tee from madagascar 3 is one he will not want to get out of. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat and helps keep dry. Pair it with shorts and sandals for sunny days and layer on a jacket for chilly evenings. Product Description White single jersey knit t-shirt, print on front, crew neck, short navy blue sleeves with white overlock, navy blue rib knit binding at neck Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours Medium iron Do not iron on print
